name: Weapons

rows.Name: Titan Fist
rows.Effect: Punch an adjacent tile, damaging and pushing it.
rows.Upgrade 1: Dash ()Charge any distance before punching the target.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

rows.Name: Electric Whip
rows.Effect: Chain damage through adjacent targets.
rows.Upgrade 1: Building Chain ()Chain through Grid Buildings without causing damage.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Deals +1 damage to all affected tiles.

rows.Name: Burst Beam
rows.Effect: Fire a piercing beam that decreases in damage the further it goes.
rows.Upgrade 1: Ally Immune ()Friendly units will not take damage from this attack. (Buildings will still be damaged and shields will be removed)
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases the starting damage by 1.

rows.Name: Spartan Shield
rows.Effect: Bash the enemy, flipping its attack direction. (Doesn't affect multi-directional attacks)
rows.Upgrade 1: Gain Shield ()Gain a Shield when bashing.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Rock Launcher
rows.Effect: Throw a rock at a chosen target. Rock remains as an obstacle.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Sidewinder Fist
rows.Effect: Punch an adjacent tile, damaging and pushing it to the left.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1. (Powering both upgrades allows you to move a square when you attack)

rows.Name: Rocket Fist
rows.Effect: Punch an adjacent tile. Upgrades to launch as a projectile.(Has knockback)
rows.Upgrade 1: Rocket ()Launch the fist. Pushes the Mech if target is not adjacent.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

rows.Name: Vice Fist
rows.Effect: Grab a unit and toss it behind you.(If an unit is thrown onto ACID, ACID will apply first then damage)
rows.Upgrade 1: Ally Immune ()Deals no damage to allies.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

rows.Name: Flame Thrower
rows.Effect: Push target tile and light tiles on Fire. Damage units already on Fire. (Starts with 1 range.)
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Range ()Extends flamethrower range by 1 tile.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Range ()Extends flamethrower range by 1 tile.

rows.Name: Explosive Vents
rows.Effect: Blast (and push) all adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Prime Spear
rows.Effect: Stab multiple tiles and push the furthest hit tile. (Starts with 2-tile range.)
rows.Upgrade 1: A.C.I.D. Tip ()Adds A.C.I.D. to the furthest hit enemy.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Range ()Increases the maximum number of hit tiles by 1.

rows.Name: Hydraulic Legs
rows.Effect: Leap to a tile, damaging self and adjacent tiles (with push).
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage Each ()Increases damage to self and targets by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to targets by 1.

rows.Name: Vortex Fist
rows.Effect: Damage and push all adjacent tiles to the left.
rows.Upgrade 1: -1 Self Damage ()Reduces the damage the Mech takes when using this weapon by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to targets by 1.

rows.Name: Titanite Blade
rows.Effect: Swing a massive sword to damage and push 3 tiles.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage on each affected tile by 2.

rows.Name: Mercury Fist
rows.Effect: Smash the ground, dealing huge damage and pushing adjacent tiles.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Thermal Discharger
rows.Effect: Damage up to two or more tiles in a line and push tiles to the left and right of damaged tiles. (Starts with 2-tile range.)
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Range ()Increases the maximum Range by 2.
rows.Upgrade 2: Add Fire ()Adds Fire to all hit tiles.

rows.Name: The Big One
rows.Effect: Fires a huge missile that damages in a large cone shape. (Deals 3 damage to target, 2 to 3 tiles behind it, and 1 to 5 tiles further behind. Has knockback.)
rows.Upgrade 1: -1 Self Damage ()Deals 1 less damage to the user.
rows.Upgrade 2: -1 Self Damage ()Deals 1 less damage to the user.

rows.Name: Prism Laser
rows.Effect: Laser that increases in damage for each unit that it hits.
rows.Upgrade 1: Ally Immune ()Friendly units will not take damage from this attack.
rows.Upgrade 2: No Max Damage ()Removes the upper limit on damage.

rows.Name: Hydraulic Lifter
rows.Effect: Throw an adjacent unit and damage it. (Starts with 2-tile range.)
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Range ()Increases the range of the throw by 2.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases the damage of the throw by 2.

rows.Name: Refractor Laser
rows.Effect: A laser that can bend, dealing more damage to nearby tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: Ally Immune ()Friendly units will not take damage from this attack.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()+2 maximum damage

rows.Name: Spring-Loaded Legs
rows.Effect: Leap and attack a tile (next to your landing point), dealing damage and pushing it.
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Range ()Leap up to 4 tiles away.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increase damage to the target by 2.

rows.Name: Fissure Fist
rows.Effect: Heavily damage a tile, cracking tiles behind the target on kill.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increase damage to the target by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.

rows.Name: Taurus Cannon
rows.Effect: Fires a powerful projectile that damages and pushes its target.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Aerial Bombs
rows.Effect: Fly over a target, dropping an explosive smoke bomb.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Range ()Allows jumping over and attacking an additional target.

rows.Name: Janus Cannon
rows.Effect: Fire two projectiles in opposite directions (with push).
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Phase Cannon
rows.Effect: Shoot a projectile that phases through objects (rocks, explosive boulders, Grid Buildings,MechsandAllied UnitsexcludingOld Earth Damandmountains).
rows.Upgrade 1: Phase Shield ()Applies a Shield to buildings it passes through.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Grappling Hook
rows.Effect: Use a grapple to pull Mech towards immovable objects, or units to the Mech.
rows.Upgrade 1: Shield Ally ()If used on an ally unit it gives them a Shield.

rows.Name: Def. Shrapnel
rows.Effect: Fire a non-damaging projectile that pushes tiles around the target.

rows.Name: Rail Cannon
rows.Effect: Projectile that does more damage to targets that are further away.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Max Damage ()Increases max damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Max Damage ()Increases max damage by 2.

rows.Name: Shock Cannon
rows.Effect: Fire a projectile that hits 2 tiles, pushing them in opposite directions.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Ramming Engines
rows.Effect: Fly in a line and slam into the target, pushing it and hurting yourself.(The self damage is also considered as attack to terrain)
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage Each ()Increases damage to self and target by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to target by 1.

rows.Name: Unstable Cannon
rows.Effect: Powerful projectile that causes damage to shooter as well as target (and push each).
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage Each ()Increases damage to self and target by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases target damage by 1.

rows.Name: Heavy Rocket
rows.Effect: Fire a projectile that heavily damages a target and pushes adjacent tiles.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

rows.Name: Shrapnel Cannon
rows.Effect: Shoot a projectile that damages and pushes the targeted tile and the tiles to its left and right.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Astra Bombs
rows.Effect: Leap over any distance dropping a bomb on each tile you pass.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage to all tiles by 2.

rows.Name: Hermes Engines
rows.Effect: Dash in a line, pushing adjacent tiles away.

rows.Name: Reverse Thrusters
rows.Effect: Smoke and deal damage to a tile while dashing away. (The further you dash, the more damage deals. Starts with 2-tile range.)
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Range ()Increases the max distance and damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases the max distance and damage by 1.

rows.Name: Fracturing Shells
rows.Effect: Fires a projectile that explodes on contact, damaging and pushing adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Damage ()Increases the damage to adjacent tiles by 2.
rows.Upgrade 2: Buildings Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

rows.Name: AP Cannon
rows.Effect: Fire a pushing projectile that pierces the first target and damages the second.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to the second hit tile by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to the second hit tile by 1.

rows.Name: Guided Missile
rows.Effect: A projectile that can turn once before hitting its target.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()+1 Damage to the target.
rows.Upgrade 2: Smoke Line ()After turning, adds Smoke to each tile passed through.

rows.Name: Ricochet Rocket
rows.Effect: Bounce a projectile off one target to hit another (and push each).
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()+1 damage to both targets.
rows.Upgrade 2: Ally Immune ()Friendly units will not take damage from this attack.

rows.Name: Quick-Fire Rockets
rows.Effect: Fire two projectiles in different directions.
rows.Upgrade 1: Add Push ()Will now push both targets.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()+1 damage to both targets.

rows.Name: EM Railgun
rows.Effect: Pierce through any killed Enemies.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Damage ()Deals 2 additional damage to all targets.
rows.Upgrade 2: Building Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

rows.Name: Artemis Artillery
rows.Effect: Powerful artillery strike, damaging a single tile and pushing adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: Buildings Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

rows.Name: Rock Accelerator
rows.Effect: Launch a rock at a tile, pushing tiles to the left and right.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Cluster Artillery
rows.Effect: Protect a tile by damaging and pushing adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: Buildings Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to adjacent tiles by 1.

rows.Name: Rocket Artillery
rows.Effect: Fires a pushing artillery and creates Smoke behind the shooter.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Vulcan Artillery
rows.Effect: Light the target on Fire and push adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: Backburn ()Light the tile behind the Mech on Fire.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Adds 2 damage to targeted tiles.

rows.Name: Micro-Artillery
rows.Effect: Artillery with potential to launch multiple small projectiles (with push).
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Tiles ()Add additional missiles to hit adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to all tiles by 1.

rows.Name: Aegon Mortar
rows.Effect: Deals damage to two tiles, pushing one forwards and one backwards.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to both tiles by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to both tiles by 1.

rows.Name: Cryo-Launcher
rows.Effect: Freeze yourself and the target.

rows.Name: Smoke Mortar
rows.Effect: Artillery shot that applies Smoke and pushes two adjacent tiles.

rows.Name: Burning Mortar
rows.Effect: Artillery attack that sets 5 tiles on Fire.
rows.Upgrade 1: No Self Damage ()This attack will no longer damage the Mech that uses it.

rows.Name: Raining Death
rows.Effect: A dangerous projectile that damages everything it passes.
rows.Upgrade 1: Buildings Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage Each ()Increases damage to self and targets by 1.

rows.Name: Heavy Artillery
rows.Effect: Powerful attack that damages a large area.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Gemini Missiles
rows.Effect: Launch two missiles, damaging and pushing two targets.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Tri-Rocket
rows.Effect: Damage and push 3 tiles in a line. (Can aim close tile.)
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Deals 1 additional damage to all targets.
rows.Upgrade 2: Building Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

rows.Name: Bomb Dispenser
rows.Effect: Launch a Walking Bomb. Unused bombs dismantle after the enemy turn.
rows.Upgrade 1: 2 Bombs ()Fire a second Walking Bomb in a different direction.

rows.Name: Arachnoid Injector
rows.Effect: Damage target, creating a friendly robot spider on kill.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases the artillery attack damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: Acidic ()Adds ACID to the attack of the Arachnoid.

rows.Name: Smoldering Shells
rows.Effect: Damage and apply Fire to a tile while adding Smoke to adjacent tiles (vertical).
rows.Upgrade 1: More Smoke ()Adds Smoke to more tiles (in 4 directions).
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases the center tile damage by 2.

rows.Name: Rebounding Volley
rows.Effect: Artillery attack that can bounce to an additional target. (Pull the first and push the second.)
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases the damage to both targets by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: Building Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

rows.Name: Quick-Fire Artillery
rows.Effect: Fire two artillery shots in different directions.
rows.Upgrade 1: Ally Immune ()Friendly units will not take damage from this attack.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage to each hit tile by 2.

rows.Name: Cascading Resonator
rows.Effect: Killed enemies explode; victims of splash damage also explode on death.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage to each hit tile by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +Building Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

rows.Name: Attraction Pulse
rows.Effect: Fires a projectile, pulling target towards you 1 tile.

rows.Name: Grav Well
rows.Effect: Artillery weapon that pulls its target towards you.

rows.Name: Repulse
rows.Effect: Push all adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: Shield Self ()Creates a personal Shield when used.
rows.Upgrade 2: Shield Friendly ()Shield adjacent ally or Building.

rows.Name: Teleporter
rows.Effect: Swap places with a nearby tile. (Note: if you are webbed and swap places with another unit, the other unit will become webbed.)
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Range ()Extends range of the swap by 1 tile.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Range ()Extends range of the swap by 2 tiles.

rows.Name: A.C.I.D. Projector
rows.Effect: Fire a projectile that applies A.C.I.D. and pushes.

rows.Name: Confuse Shot
rows.Effect: Fire a projectile that flips a target's attack direction.

rows.Name: Smoke Pellets
rows.Effect: Surround yourself with Smoke to defend against nearby enemies.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: Ally Immune ()No longer applies Smoke on self or allies.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.

rows.Name: Shield Projector
rows.Effect: Shield tiles from damage.2 uses per battle.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +3 Area ()Shields 3 additional tiles.

rows.Name: Fire Beam
rows.Effect: Fire a beam that applies Fire in a line.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.

rows.Name: Frost Beam
rows.Effect: Fire a beam that Freezes everything in a line.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.

rows.Name: Shield Array
rows.Effect: Apply a Shield on nearby tiles.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Size ()Area of effect increased by 2 tiles.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.

rows.Name: Push Beam
rows.Effect: Pushes all units in a line.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: Unlimited Use ()Removes use restriction in battles.

rows.Name: Firestorm Generator
rows.Effect: Flaming artillery that drops fire on the way to its target (and push the target). (Starts with 2-tile range.)
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Range ()Maximum range is increased by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Range ()Maximum range is increased by 2.

rows.Name: Area Shift
rows.Effect: Push self and all adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: Shield Self ()Shield the user when activated.
rows.Upgrade 2: Shield Ally ()Shield any Ally units affected by this skill.

rows.Name: Explosive Warp
rows.Effect: Teleport to target and push nearby tiles away. Can also be used to push the user to the original position by teleporting to the tile right next to it.
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Range ()Increases the teleport range by 2.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Range ()Increases the teleport range by 2.

rows.Name: Shield Placer
rows.Effect: Shield target and push adjacent tiles away.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Range ()Can target one additional tile away.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Range ()Can target one additional tile away.(This is actually +2 range. The text is wrong in game)

rows.Name: Enrage Shot
rows.Effect: Force targeted unit to attack adjacent tile.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()The targeted unit does 1 extra damage with its attack.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()The targeted unit does 1 extra damage with its attack.

rows.Name: Control Shot
rows.Effect: Temporarily control a unit, moving it a short distance (2 tiles).
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Move ()Targeted unit can move one extra tile.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Move ()Targeted unit can move one extra tile.

rows.Name: Force Swap
rows.Effect: Force a nearby unit to swap places with any other unit.
rows.Upgrade 1: Heal Ally ()Swapping an ally will heal it completely.
rows.Upgrade 2: Hurt Enemy ()Swapping an enemy will deal 1 damage to it.

rows.Name: Seismic Capacitor
rows.Effect: Damage and flip target. If target is killed, crack adjacent tiles.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increase damage to the target by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increase damage to the target by 1.

rows.Name: (N/A)Gravity Mirror
rows.Effect: Fire a gravity well in 4 directions, pushing or pulling every unit. (Only available through debug)

rows.Name: Boosters
rows.Effect: Jump forward and push adjacent tiles away.

rows.Name: Smoke Bombs
rows.Effect: Fly over the targets while dropping Smoke.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Range ()Increases potential movement range by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Range ()Increases potential movement range by 1.

rows.Name: Heat Converter
rows.Effect: Freeze the tile in front but light the tile behind on Fire in the process.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.

rows.Name: Self-Destruct
rows.Effect: Mech explodes, killing self and anything adjacent to Mech.Single-use.

rows.Name: Targeted Strike
rows.Effect: Call in an air strike on a single tile anywhere on the map.Single-use.

rows.Name: Smoke Drop
rows.Effect: Drops Smoke on 5 tiles anywhere on the map.Single-use.

rows.Name: Repair Drop
rows.Effect: Heal all player units (including disabled Mechs).Single-use.

rows.Name: Missile Barrage
rows.Effect: Fires a missile barrage that hits every enemy on the map.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Wind Torrent
rows.Effect: Push all units in a single direction.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: Unlimited Uses ()Removes use restriction in battles.

rows.Name: Ice Generator
rows.Effect: Freeze yourself and nearby tiles.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Size ()Area of effect increased by 1 tile.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Size ()Area of effect increased by 1 tile.

rows.Name: Mass Confusion
rows.Effect: Cause nearby enemies to flip their attack direction.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Size ()Area of effect increased by 1 tile.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.

rows.Name: Grid Repulse
rows.Effect: Overload the grid, causing a building to push away nearby units.
rows.Upgrade 1: Add Shield ()The selected building also gains a shield.

rows.Name: Grid Assault
rows.Effect: Overload the grid causing a building to damage and push an adjacent tile.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: +1 Damage ()Increases damage by 1.

rows.Name: Bombing Run
rows.Effect: Call in bombers, dealing damage to every tile in a row or column.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: Building Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

rows.Name: Grid Charger
rows.Effect: Killing an enemy will charge the Power Grid 1 point. Single-use.

rows.Name: Flood Drill
rows.Effect: Convert any liquid Tile to a Hole, spreading the liquid to adjacent tiles.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Use ()Increases uses per battle by 1.

rows.Name: Light Tank
rows.Effect: Deploy a small tank to help in combat.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Health ()Increases the Tank's max health to 3.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases the Tank's attack damage to 2.

rows.Name: Shield-Tank
rows.Effect: Deploy a Shield-Tank that can give Shields to allies.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Health ()Increases the Shield-Tank's max health to 3.
rows.Upgrade 2: Projectile ()The Shield-Tank instead fires a projectile, allowing you to Shield distant targets.

rows.Name: A.C.I.D. Tank
rows.Effect: Deploy a Tank that can apply A.C.I.D. to targets.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Health ()Increases the Tank's max health to 3.
rows.Upgrade 2: Push ()The tank's attack also pushes its target.

rows.Name: Pull-Tank
rows.Effect: Deploy a Pull-Tank that can pull targets with a projectile.Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: +2 Health ()Increases the Pull-Tank's max health to 3.
rows.Upgrade 2: Flying ()Gives the Pull-Tank the ability to fly.

rows.Name: (N/A)Support IceTank
rows.Effect: Deploy an Ice-Tank to that can freeze its targets. (Only available through debug)Single-use.
rows.Upgrade 1: N/A ()
rows.Upgrade 2: N/A ()

rows.Name: Ramming Speed
rows.Effect: Dash across the map, damaging and pushing the target tile.
rows.Upgrade 1: Smoke Behind ()Tile behind you gains Smoke.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

rows.Name: Needle Shot
rows.Effect: Throw needles at the enemy, pushing the furthest hit tile. (Starts with 1-tile range.)
rows.Upgrade 1: Range & Damage ()Increases potential hit tiles by 1 and damage on all tiles by 1.
rows.Upgrade 2: Range & Damage ()Increases potential hit tiles by 1 and damage on all tiles by 1.

rows.Name: Explosive Goo
rows.Effect: Artillery attack that damages a tile and pushes adjacent tiles away.
rows.Upgrade 1: +1 Tile ()Increases area hit by 1 tile.
rows.Upgrade 2: +2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

sections.Description:
Each of theMechshave a Weapon equipped, and will do different things depending on how you want to use them. Note that all weapons have friendly fire ON (unless an exception is mentioned) so if you don't plan properly you can damage your own Mechs.
Most weapons come with an upgrade or two, at the cost of additionalReactor Coreusage. Upgrades are not purchased separately from their base weapons, they are included.
Note that powering Upgrade 1 is never a prerequisite for powering Upgrade 2.
